source_paper.title: Paper Title (Original Language)
source_paper.doi: DOI (Only if explicitly stated in the text. Leave empty if unknown. Do NOT search the web as it will be auto-completed by the API)

notes.content: Text of the knowledge element (Summarized in English. MUST include important numerical values and specific methods)
notes.context: Explanation of the context in which this knowledge element is important (in English)
